item.title: 2.0.0-alpha.4
item.description:
Sequoia launch fix (alpha.3 regression)

alpha.3 signed the bundle with hardened runtime (--options=runtime) plus ad-hoc signing. Sequoia 15+ rejects that combo because hardened runtime requires a Developer ID plus notarization. Result was the same generic "cannot be opened because of a problem" dialog that alpha.1 produced. This alpha drops the runtime flag; bundle is plain ad-hoc signed with sealed resources.

Heads up for alpha.4 installs: the alpha.4 build was published with an incorrect Sparkle feed URL (pointed at a private repo). Auto-update from alpha.4 to alpha.5 will not work; please download alpha.5 manually one time from the releases page. Auto-update will resume from alpha.5 onward.
